name: send_email
description: Send a single transactional email through Postmark. Supports HTML and plain text bodies, file attachments, open tracking, link tracking, metadata, and message streams. You can send to up to 50 recipients per request. For bulk sending, use the batch endpoint instead.

parameters.name: From
parameters.description: Sender email address. Must be a confirmed Sender Signature in your Postmark account.

parameters.name: To
parameters.description: Recipient email address(es). Comma-separated for multiple recipients, max 50.

parameters.name: Subject
parameters.description: The subject line of the email.

parameters.name: HtmlBody
parameters.description: HTML body of the email. At least one of HtmlBody or TextBody is required.
parameters.example:
Password Reset

Your password has been successfully reset.

parameters.name: TextBody
parameters.description: Plain text body of the email. At least one of HtmlBody or TextBody is required.
parameters.example: Your password has been successfully reset.

parameters.name: Cc
parameters.description: CC recipient email address(es). Comma-separated for multiple.

parameters.name: Bcc
parameters.description: BCC recipient email address(es). Comma-separated for multiple.

parameters.name: Tag
parameters.description: A tag for categorizing this email. Useful for filtering in stats and activity.

parameters.name: TrackOpens
parameters.description: Whether to track when the recipient opens the email.

parameters.name: MessageStream
parameters.description: The message stream to send through. Defaults to 'outbound' for transactional email.

parameters.name: Metadata
parameters.description: Custom key-value metadata to attach to the message. Useful for tracking and filtering.

body.Subject: Your password has been reset
body.HtmlBody:
Password Reset

Your password has been successfully reset.
body.TextBody: Your password has been successfully reset.
